endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{parent}/provisioningQuotas
endpoints.description: List the budget details to provision resources on a given project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{project}/{location}:submitProvisioningConfig
endpoints.description: Submit a provisiong configuration for a given project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.
